title: Thelypteris pseudomegaphylla
taxonomy: Thelypteris pseudomegaphylla belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This species of fern is classified under the genus Thelypteris and the subfamily Thelypteroideae. It is further classified as a member of the order Polypodiales and the class Polypodiopsida. The kingdom to which Thelypteris pseudomegaphylla belongs is Plantae. This classification is based on its morphological and molecular characteristics.
